channel.title: LLM Timeline — Hugging Face Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Hugging Face.

item.title: SmolLM2 (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: SmolLM2 License: open Type: model Base and instruct versions, with Apache 2.0 license

item.title: SmolLM (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: SmolLM License: open Type: model Dataset includes new Cosmopedia v2 synthetic data. 135M and 360M models,each trained on 600B tokens from Smollm-Corpus. 1.7B model trained on 1T tokens from Smollm-Corpus.

item.title: Zephyr 141B-A39B (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 141B License: closed Type: model AI model by Hugging Face

item.title: Idefics2 (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: Idefics2 License: open Type: model Clone of Flamingo now using Mistral 7B. Named after Asterix and Obelix's dog Idefix (Image-aware Decoder Enhanced à la Flamingo with Interleaved Cross-attentionS)

item.title: Zephyr 7B (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by Hugging Face

item.title: IDEFICS-80B (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 80B License: open Type: model AI model by Hugging Face

item.title: IDEFICS-9B (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model AI model by Hugging Face

item.title: IDEFICS (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: IDEFICS License: open Type: model Clone of Flamingo using Llama-1 65B. Named after Asterix and Obelix's dog Idefix (Image-aware Decoder Enhanced à la Flamingo with Interleaved Cross-attentionS)

item.title: BLOOMZ-176B (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 176B License: open Type: model AI model by Hugging Face

item.title: Tk-Instruct (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: Tk-Instruct License: open Type: model Based on T5.

item.title: DistilBERT (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 66M License: open Type: model AI model by Hugging Face
